steps.title: Close both interruptions
steps.content: The dash after territories opens a supplementary list of territories. Within that list, the phrase present-day Ecuador also needs a closing parenthesis.

steps.title: Pair the dash correctly
steps.content: The blank must close the parenthesis after Ecuador and close the dashed list before from colonial rule. A adds an unnecessary comma and no dash, B omits the dash, and C uses a comma where a matching dash is needed. The answer is D.
